name: kernel
description: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. v7.21: adds the runaway-agent killswitch — a fail-open PreToolUse hook capping per-session tool calls + duration, with a save-work allowlist so work is never lost. The plugin stays general-purpose — project-specific session overlays live in the consuming repo's own hooks, not here.
